column1: Mickey Moniak headlines today’s Beat The Streak picks with a scorching 74.3% hit probability, batting second at home in hitter-friendly Coors and enjoying the platoon edge against Matt Waldron. Right behind, Amed Rosario leads off for Boston and brings a steady top-of-order profile with a favorable matchup and a strong track record of getting on base. Drake Baldwin and Troy Johnston both benefit from the platoon advantage in solid parks, but Moniak’s combination of lineup spot, matchup, and environment makes him the clear-cut play. For those chasing a hot start, Moniak’s reliable bat is the one to trust.
